environment: Solo developer on a local Windows 11 dev box. Project is a Bannerlord v1.3.13 C# mod (Enlisted). No shared infrastructure, no production systems, no external services, no sensitive data.

Trusted routine commands: dotnet build/restore/test, Python validators under Tools/Validation/, PowerShell formatting scripts (Tools/normalize_crlf.ps1, Tools/Validation/lint_repo.ps1), read-only git inspection, reads from the sibling ../Decompile/ TaleWorlds v1.3.13 API reference.
Routine write surface: src/, ModuleData/, docs/, Tools/. Auto-approve edits within these trees.
Commits are local-only unless the user explicitly asks to push. Never force-push, never rewrite shared history, never run destructive git operations without confirmation.
